---
title: DaplaNytt-møte 22.04.2026
categories:
  - daplanytt
  - dataportal
  - vardef
  - ssb dataportal
author:
  - name: Øyvind Bruer-Skarsbø
    affiliation: 
      - name: Seksjon for dataplattform (724)
        email: obr@ssb.no
date: "04/23/2026"
date-modified: "04/23/2026"
image: ../../../images/dapla-long.png
draft: false
lightbox: true
---

DaplaNytt fra april 2026 ble avholdt som Teams-møte 22. april 2026. [Se opptak her](https://engage.cloud.microsoft/main/org/ssb.no/threads/eyJfdHlwZSI6IlRocmVhZCIsImlkIjoiMzgyMzI4MDE3NzUxMjQ0OCJ9?trk_copy_link=V2). 

Slides [finner du her](https://ideal-guide-egkqq6z.pages.github.io/daplanytt-apr26.html#/title-slide).
